name: ImageCreator
description_zh: 图像创作与交付入口：把海报、封面、产品图、角色/风格参考、图片编辑和本地后处理需求转成可执行方案、生成/编辑任务、结果评审和交付文件。适合“帮我生成一组产品海报”“根据参考图做同风格图片”“这张图去背景并转 webp”。触发词：生图、图片设计、海报、参考图、同风格、图片编辑、去背景、转格式。
description_en: Image creation and delivery entrypoint for posters, covers, product visuals, reference-based image design, image editing plans, deterministic local post-processing, review, and final asset handoff.
workflow:
1. Read the user's task and any attached files. Classify the job as image design, reference-based generation, edit planning, provider execution, deterministic post-processing, review, or a combination.
2. Use image-design first for creative brief, prompt, aspect ratio, visual constraints, reference consistency, edit plan, and provider-independent routing. Do not promise a specific model result before checking execution constraints.
3. Only use dreamina or nano-banana when the task explicitly asks for that provider or when the provider is suitable and the user has supplied or confirmed account, cost, privacy, upload, and output constraints. If those dependencies are missing, return the minimal confirmation checklist and stop. Do not use ComfyUI in this workflow.
4. Use image-process only for deterministic local processing of existing files, such as resize, crop, convert, compress, watermark, EXIF removal, or simple background/alpha handling. Preserve originals unless the user explicitly asks to overwrite.
5. Use image-review to inspect generated, edited, or processed outputs against the brief, reference constraints, technical quality, brand/use-case fit, and safety risks. Iterate only when the user has confirmed any extra cost, upload, or external model usage.
6. Deliver file paths, prompts, provider or tool choices, settings, review notes, and any remaining decisions clearly. When generation is not possible in the current environment, deliver the best executable prompt pack and handoff plan instead of pretending execution happened.

inputs.label: 任务
inputs.placeholder: 例如：帮我生成一组同风格产品海报，并把最终图转成 webp

inputs.label: 素材文件
inputs.description: 可选：参考图、源图、品牌素材或需要处理的图片。
